chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Customs Reference Application 119 of 2017 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection NO.17 2. For orders on CMA No.1110/2017 3. For hearing of main case 21.10.2025 Ms. Masooda Siraj, advocate for the applicant Under instructions learned counsel for the applicant does not press this reference application which is dismissed as withdrawn. A copy of this order may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Amjad
